meta.title: Scalable OJS Journal Ecosystem | Hardip Parmar - Case Study
meta.description: How I deployed and maintained multiple Open Journal Systems (OJS) platforms for international research journals with high reliability and performance.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: Multiple academic journals required reliable OJS installations with proper configuration, performance optimization, and ongoing maintenance.
challenge.additionalInfo: Each journal had unique requirements such as editorial workflows, submission systems, indexing, and uptime reliability. Managing multiple independent journal systems created challenges in consistency, updates, and server stability.

problems.title: Complex Multi-Journal Setup
problems.description: Each journal required separate OJS installations with proper configuration and domain setup.

problems.title: Maintenance & Stability Issues
problems.description: Frequent updates, backups, and performance monitoring were required to ensure uninterrupted journal operations.

solution.title: The Architectural Solution
solution.subtitle: Standardized deployment and proactive maintenance across multiple OJS platforms.
solution.description: Delivered a scalable and stable ecosystem for academic publishing using OJS.

features.title: OJS Deployment & Configuration
features.description: Installed and configured Open Journal Systems for multiple journals with proper domain mapping and server setup.

features.title: Editorial Workflow Setup
features.description: Configured submission, peer-review, and publishing workflows tailored to each journal’s requirements.

features.title: Security & Backup Management
features.description: Implemented regular backups, security hardening, and update management to protect journal data.

features.title: Performance Optimization
features.description: Optimized server configurations and database performance to ensure fast access and reliable uptime.

features.title: Ongoing Maintenance & Support
features.description: Provided continuous monitoring, bug fixes, and support for multiple live journal platforms.

technicalDeepDive.title: Technical Deep Dive: OJS Multi-Site Management
technicalDeepDive.description: A standardized deployment strategy was implemented for managing multiple OJS instances. Each installation was configured with optimized PHP settings, database tuning, and automated backup systems. Cron jobs were configured for scheduled tasks such as indexing, email notifications, and cleanup operations.

codeExample.title: OJS Scheduled Task (Cron)
codeExample.code:
# Run OJS scheduled tasks every hour
0 * * * * php /var/www/ojs/tools/runScheduledTasks.php

testimonials.quote: The stability and reliability of our journal platforms improved significantly after the implementation.
testimonials.author: Editorial Team
testimonials.title: Research Journal

testimonials.quote: Consistent maintenance and quick support ensured our publishing workflow never stopped.

testimonials.title: Academic Publishing
